tasks.label: CMake: Build Audiocity (Debug)
args: cmake --preset default; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'Retrying configure after deleting the stale build directory.'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'build') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'build' -Recurse -Force }; cmake --preset default; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; cmake --build --preset default --config Debug --target Audiocity_All; exit $LASTEXITCODE
tasks.detail: Build Standalone + VST3 in Debug mode

tasks.label: CMake: Build Audiocity (Release Self-Contained)
args: cmake --preset release-selfcontained; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmake --build --preset release-selfcontained
tasks.detail: Build Standalone + VST3 in self-contained Release mode

tasks.label: Release: Build Artifacts
tasks.detail: Build self-contained release artifacts (Inno Setup installer + portable zip)

tasks.label: CMake: Build Tests (Debug)
args: cmake --preset default; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'Retrying configure after deleting the stale build directory.'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'build') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'build' -Recurse -Force }; cmake --preset default; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; cmake --build --preset default --config Debug --target audiocity_offline_tests; exit $LASTEXITCODE
tasks.detail: Build offline test runner in Debug mode
